Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Resonses By Pltf To Requests To Produce Documents And For Sanctions Against Pltf And Its Counsel James Macleod And The Dunning Law Firm
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Christopher Cole, Esq. (415.978.9999) appearing for NELLIE C. MUGANDA, defendant / moving party; No other appearance.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling re Defendant NELLIE MUGANDA'S Motion to Compel Further Responses by Plaintiff to Requests to Produce Documents and for Sanctions against Plaintiff and Its Counsel James Macleod and The Dunning Law Firm. The Court finds that the motion to compel is moot in light of the amended responses which were served after the motion was filed. The Court finds that the original responses were insufficient pursuant to CPP 2031.220 and imposes sanctions on Plaintiff in the amount of $300 as the result of Defendant needing to file this motion before the amended responses were served. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
